Set up secure control channel.z
234 AUTH TLS successfulN)
cmd_auth
DummyTLS_FTPHandler.cmd_authc
Nz 220 Reverting back to clear-textT)
cmd_ccc
DummyTLS_FTPHandler.cmd_cccc
Negotiate size of buffer for secure data transfer.
            For TLS/SSL the only valid value for the parameter is '0'.
            Any other value is accepted but ignored.
            z
200 PBSZ=0 successful.Nrn
